description_long: This object is a large, tactical rotary grenade launcher with a robust, matte black finish. It features a prominent revolving drum magazine capable of holding multiple rounds, a thick cylindrical barrel with a vented handguard, and a sturdy telescoping adjustable stock for shoulder support. The weapon is equipped with a vertical foregrip for enhanced control and a Picatinny rail system on top for mounting optics or accessories. The trigger assembly and pistol grip are ergonomically designed, and the overall construction suggests a heavy-duty, metal-dominated build. The design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function and durability for urban combat scenarios.
description: A heavy, matte black rotary grenade launcher with a large revolving drum, telescoping stock, and vented barrel. Features include a vertical foregrip, Picatinny rail, and ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the barrel and the end of the revolving drum, with the vertical foregrip visible below.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the launcher, the large drum magazine, telescoping stock, and Picatinny rail on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock, the rear of the drum, and the alignment of the barrel and grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the drum, stock, and foregrip, with the Picatinny rail and handguard details visible.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with vented handguard
attribute_stock_design: telescoping adjustable stock with polymer construction
